overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark futuristic corporate facility, moving through industrial corridors, server rooms with red lighting, and ascending stairs toward an illuminated Arasaka logo. Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting.

emerges from darkness into area with overhead linear lighting

server racks with blue-white indicator lights visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark narrow corridor with metal walls and dimly lit server racks. The camera turns right into a wider industrial hallway, transitioning from near-total darkness to an area illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide industrial transport corridor with lane markings

events.description: slight left turn while continuing forward through corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wide corridor with yellow safety lines

metal safety railing running along the corridor edge

segments.scene_description: Moving through a wide industrial corridor marked with yellow safety lines and illuminated by overhead linear lights. The space is empty with metal railings along the sides as the camera makes a slight left turn while proceeding forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: server room and control center with monitoring stations

events.description: turns left entering server room with red illuminated racks
enters control room area with multiple monitor stations displaying data

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a server room dominated by red illuminated server racks on the left, then opens into a control room filled with monitoring stations and multiple screens. The lighting shifts to a red neon glow from the server indicators.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell and elevated walkway leading to Arasaka logo

Arasaka logo becomes visible illuminated on the wall

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and ramp toward upper level, approaching the illuminated Arasaka logo

entered.detail: metal stairs with safety railings leading upward to upper level
large illuminated Arasaka corporate logo mounted on the wall
raised platform walkway with metal railings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the control room into a darker stairwell, the camera ascends metal stairs and continues up a ramp. The large illuminated Arasaka corporate logo becomes visible on the right wall as the camera approaches the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark corporate facility that transitions from claustrophobic industrial corridors into a high-tech command center and finally toward a corporate monument. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit corridor flanked by server racks, turning right into a wider industrial hallway where the darkness gives way to bright overhead fluorescent lighting and yellow safety lines. As the camera proceeds forward and makes a slight left turn, the environment shifts into a server room dominated by a red neon glow before opening into a control room filled with monitoring stations and screens. The scene then moves out of the red light and into a darker stairwell, ascending metal stairs and a ramp as the space opens up. Finally, the camera reaches the upper level, bringing a large illuminated Arasaka corporate logo into clear view on the right wall.
